untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific 'prior breakout level (A)' and distinction between 'pullback failure' vs normal pullback—these are relative/contextual price levels that cannot be expressed as fixed indicator thresholds. Parameters momentum_bars_required, pullback_penetration_threshold_atr, and position_size_percent_of_account are undefined ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]). Exit conditions reference swing low and risk/reward ratio which require lookback window specification not provided.
translation_notes: Translated core reversion logic: Entry uses lower timeframe continuation bias (lower wick < body suggests downside momentum) + volume confirmation + price below recent high (pullback failure proxy). Exit triggers on price reclaiming prior high (breakout level breach). Direction set to SHORT as signal targets short entries into failed pullbacks. Without specific breakout level identification and threshold values, full signal intent cannot be captured.
